name: Golden Apple Custard Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 large Golden Delicious apples; cored and sliced (do not peel)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the butter over the bottom of the pie shell. Arrange apple slices in the pie shell in an overlapping pinwheel design.
2. In a large bowl, beat together eggs, milk, light cream, vanilla, and all but 2 teaspoons of the sugar.
3. Carefully pour the egg mixture over the apples. Mix the reserved 2 teaspoons sugar with nutmeg and salt and sprinkle on top.
4. Place the pie in a roasting pan and place it in the oven. Pour enough boiling water into the roasting pan to reach halfway up the sides of the pie pan.
5. Bake in a preheated 400-degree oven for 40 minutes. Reduce the temperature to 300 degrees and bake until the custard is set, about 20 minutes longer.
6. Cool the pie completely before cutting. Refrigerate leftovers.
